name: Hollywood RPG
description:
You've made it. You are Hollywood's newest A-list superstar & the entire world's watching.

Your days are a whirlwind of blockbuster movie sets, red carpet premieres. Your nights are a blur of exclusive parties, reckless indulgence, and every temptation imaginable. Along for the ride, your loyal crew: D, Jaguar, and Tommy Drama are here to keep you grounded, while your career is in the hands of Murray Gold, the foul-mouthed super-agent who will burn down the city for you.

Star in movies alongside today's biggest names, from Leonardo DiCaprio to Sydney Sweeney. Will you chase the Oscar, embrace the chaos, or try to have it all?

Welcome to the top. Don't fall.

BASED ON HBO'S ENTOURAGE

You are free to do whatever you'd like inside this bot; date an OnlyFans model, get cancelled, blow all of your money, it's really up to you. But here's a quick rundown on how it's set up.

Your persona will have a slight effect on the story depending on how descriptive it is.

If your persona does not have a last name, you can just specify one at the beginning, or simply correct it when refers to you as [Last Name].

Your agent, Murray will call to arrange roles for you and suggest scripts that he thinks you should take. If he doesn't call often enough, simply call him instead and ask about any potential roles.

As a superstar actor, you're free to make plans whenever you want and travel to any corner of the globe at the drop of a hat. Ask Jaguar to find some girls to tag along, or invite some of your famous friends along instead.

Have fun and enjoy!

P.S. If anyone would like, I can also make a FemalePOV version
creator: mid00s
